zh.Dudley, Metropolitan Borough of Dudley,: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲杜德利
zh.lifeSummary: Dame Beatrix de Picquigny於1059年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲杜德利。她於大約1084年與Fulk De Peynel在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1130年在她的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲杜德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dame Beatrix de Picquigny于1059年出生在英国英格兰韋斯特 米德藍茲杜德利。她于大约1084年与Fulk De Peynel在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1130年在她的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 米德藍茲杜德利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Dame Beatrix de Picquigny was born in 1059, in Dudley, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom. She married Fulk De Peynel about 1084, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1130, in her hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Dudley, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Dame Beatrix de Picquigny est née en 1059, à Dudley, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Fulk De Peynel environ 1084, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1130, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Dudley, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.Dudley, Metropolitan Borough of Dudley,: イギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズダドリー
ja.lifeSummary: Dame Beatrix de Picquignyは1059年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズダドリーで生まれた。約1084年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでFulk De Peynelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1130年に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズダドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Beatrix de Picquigny(은)는 1059년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 드들리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1084년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Fulk De Peynel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1130년 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 드들리에 묻혔다.

ro.Dudley, Metropolitan Borough of Dudley,: Dudley, West Midlands, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Dame Beatrix de Picquigny родилась в 1059 г. в местности дудли, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulk De Peynel около 1084 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1130 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности дудли, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания.
